title: Abacus AI Just Dropped AI SuperComputer With Claude And Gemini
summary: Abacus AI launched AI SuperComputer, a cloud platform where AI agents can build, deploy, host, and run real software in a full Ubuntu environment with databases, storage, terminal access, GitHub, AWS, and HTTPS deployment. The platform bridges the gap between code generation and live application deployment, enabling agents to move beyond code-only generation to full software lifecycle management.
